AC: 30
STR: +9 HP: +50
WT: 4.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Barbed Ringmail

Slot: CHEST
AC: 30
STR: +9 HP: +50
WT: 4.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Chain 2
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:50 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 10:12:45
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious

Rarity: Common

Uploaded November 6th, 2024 by iventheassassin

« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Prices Dropping
QuoteReply
# Feb 12 2003 at 1:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253742787
10 posts
I bought this last night on The Rathe for 1950 pp. Prices are dropping, although I think that was a fairly good deal. I turned around and sold Acrylia BP for 1100 in 10 minutes. For 850 pp, I gain 9 str and 50 hp. I like that there are no wasted stats for my warrior. I hate paying for wisdom or mana. At that price, it's a good deal. It's ugly, but the game isn't about making a fashion statement.

Refils - 51st Warrior
▲ Page top
RE: Prices Dropping
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2003 at 2:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760189534
Scholar
50 posts
I picked up one of these for 2k last night on Innoruuk. Agreed about wasted stats, it replaced a Ry'Gorr Battle Mail.

I still look rather fetching though. ;)

# Oct 06 2003 at 8:48 PM Rating: Decent

232 posts
if youre a sham rog or ranger check out steelslave breastplate of war* or something to that sound, looted in a 55ish dungeon in Rujk bein sold for 1700pp and even at lower lvls the stats are good. at 30 it has 22 out of the 35 max ac and stats are fairly good too

QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2003 at 8:23 PM Rating: Default

Hello all. I really want to buy this tunic to an upgrade to my beer stained coldain tunic, which is not all that bad for the price ive seen it for. this is an upgrade in str by 4 and gives ton of hp. I dont have that much money atm, but i am selling a FBSS and a orc fang necklace for real cheap on tunare. I always sell things cheap, just because im such a nice guy heh.)

Daillan Shadowrunner

tunare server

Barbed Ringmail VS Iksar Ceremonial Breastplate
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2002 at 3:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253843693
10 posts
As a 28th ranger i recently got one of these and is wondering if i should trade it for a Ceremonial Iksar BP?And would Barbed Ringmail be worth a Ikky BP and FBSS?
▲ Page top
RE: Barbed Ringmail VS Iksar Ceremonial Breastplate
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2002 at 12:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254285403
4 posts
Alright...the Iksar Ceremonial BP is nice for the regen, however, when in battle IT BITES! I only use it when I need to ..and when it's safe where I can sit down. It's good at lower levels when things don't hit so hard, but when you start fighting the upper level creatures...definitely get something else.

Ahnyx Crimsonblade
44th Warrior
Veeshan
▲ Page top
RE: Barbed Ringmail VS Iksar Ceremonial Breastplate
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2002 at 7:52 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361394192
60 posts
I agree with Ahnyx, I think Iksar Regen BP is sweet at lower levels (1-20) but beyond that when you tend to group more, the lack of stats and AC, makes it no where near as useful as the Barbed Ringmail. However, the regen BP would be nice to have when soloing and low on hitpoints (out of combat)
▲ Page top
This one is sux now!
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2002 at 1:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777147444
11 posts
sense new patch come out, the grey in Luclin drop a Bp named Shissar scaled

AC: +30 Agi: +15 Dex: +15 HP: +35 Mana: +35
Weight: 2.5
Classes: Ranger Shaman Cleric Paladin Shadowknight Bard Rogue Warrior
Races: All Races

Think about it, this bp is more common than barbed bp and much better states. also u can take it down by one person if the class and lvl is right. and u can do the EB necklace quest in there. if u want to sell let's take look: ppl in ec auc WTS barbed ringmail 6k, and WTB Shissar Scaled bp 14k paying cash! pst

Plz think about it: the named mob in UK drop this kind of rarly and pop rarly also. the named Shissar pop every 2 to 3 hrs if u kill these PH fast. and each time u will have chance to get this great loot, and name golem also. He droped awsome items for melee like tunic and seleeves! both of em r at same camp.

58 dru ieadaru
11 war sopamt
E'ci server

Edited, Thu Mar 28 00:58:03 2002

# May 07 2002 at 7:07 PM Rating: Decent

Muas Huas
44war
E'Ci The best server ever
▲ Page top
RE: This one is sux now!
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2002 at 4:02 PM Rating: Default
Zaztik
648 posts
Shissar BP is much better yes, but not by, well much. Less str, more dex and agi, very nice, but it also costs a lot more (on prexus it does).

Barbed Ringmail goes for 5k on prexus, while Shissar BP is 15-20k.

Decent BP
QuoteReply
# Mar 16 2002 at 1:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775119867
84 posts
I just bought one of these on Terris-Thule fer 5k. I've been using Iksar Ceremonial BP up untill now just cause the regen effect is so nice. But I finally decided that I needed a BP for fighting in groups. At 49 I don't really solo that much stuff (except when farming), so I got Barbed Ringmail fer grouping. This works out great cause I can still throw on my Ikky BP during downtime to make my HP go up.
Luck in battle,
Bulvar Biggins
Dwarf Warrior
Divine Union of Souls

p.s- For some reason I just watched the movie "O". it sucked. don't watch it :)
▲ Page top
The Barbed Ringmail
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2002 at 8:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361244912
17 posts
It is slightly better than the Treeweave in many aspects which I agree too, but the price of this item is a little too high. On the Rodcet Nife these go for 4k, this is reasonable mainly because you earn +5 ac and +50 hp and lose only 1 str. But paying 15k for this item is a little different story, not mentioning the new Luclin Armor is way better and drops off the same level mosters :P. Just my 2cps
▲ Page top
nice
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2002 at 5:06 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252037001
45 posts
this is a nice b/p especially for rogues =)

more hp to take more hits from agro

more ac to take less dmg from hits from agro

more str to cause more agro doing more damage =)
▲ Page top
#Zaztik, Posted: Jan 18 2002 at 12:52 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Payed 4k for mine last night (1/17/02). Before this I was wearing Treeweave. Sure I lose 1str, but I gain 5ac, and 50hp (which rangers need). And this thing weighs 1/3 of the Treeweave's weight! Sweet :)
Woot
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2002 at 5:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758323127
25 posts
I am so happy i won this on roll in velks.i was saving for new weapon but i needed new BP more and boom 2hours at tents pays off.within 2 hours BP,spider fur cloak,velium sword of swiftness(i think is name could be wrong),spider fur belt and 2 quest gems dropped..i found my new favorite place to be...

54Pally Celtica

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 14 2001 at 10:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hi everyone! Just one this item on a random last night. I'm selling it on the Prexus server for 8K. If anyone is interested, send me a tell in game. Ciao!
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 16 2001 at 7:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) its a good piece of armor, but worthless in raids, Resistance is king
Worth it
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 8:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758054733
7 posts
Well if you are a Pally, this is a nice piece to have. Most other BP are no drop and unless your guild can take out Trak your chances on a DW BP are slim to none. BP from Hate is like dropped once a year and Fear BP is crap. You can go to VL and camp this and get at least one to drop in a day, we had 3. Don't really like the look but hey, it has 30 AC. If one is smart, they will try to camp tents and pits as much as possilbe and get this and Sword of Blessing. Nice add to your 1HS.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2001 at 3:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361520717
1 post
Thorny Vine Breastplate is AC:26 9 STR 13 WIS 50 HP. Great upgrade for rangers...
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 28 2001 at 4:15 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Not Really (or at all), You lose 13 Wisdom trading off the Thorny Vine. And you only gain 4 AC. Plus Thorny Vine looks cool

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 15 2001 at 10:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I baught this for only 3k on bertoxxulous server off of a very nice cleric, after the patch so i baught a 30ac 9str 50hp bp for just 3k!!! i then proceeded to trade it for a Noctivagant blade!!! New Value?
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2001 at 12:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756870557
View User Forum
37 posts
Anyone have any idea of the value of this item with the recent upgrades? I have one that I wear, but may be willing to sell it if it's worth enough platinum...

Looking at other armours out there (keeping in mind the races/classes that can wear this, and who/what drops it), this piece should be worth 15k+ IMHO.

/shrug

Opinions?
▲ Page top
RE: New Value?
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2001 at 12:12 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1594570578538
Scholar
18 posts
I paid 8k for one yesterday on Tarew Marr. At 30ac I think it's a good deal but I expect the price on this to tumble fairly soon due to the extreme farming in Velk's Lab at present. If you can get 15k I would suggest taking it - they're appearing on the market pretty regularly now, mostly at around the 10k mark.

(-: Zel :-)

▲ Page top
my experience
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 1:15 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Tpos is not very hard, trivial in fact -- but we had me 60 warrior 60 chanter and 59 cleric, low 50s rest of group. He hits hard but is easily slowed, and combine that with defensive it's rather pathetic. However, a group that gets him with adds without a good tank -- could be trouble.
